chunks.page_summary: This page provides information and download links for Profinet GSD files and related documentation for Rheonics inline viscometers and density meters.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Profinet GSD file for Rheonics inline viscometer and density meter

Modified on: Fri, 15 Dec, 2023 at 9:39 PM

Profinet Support on Rheonics Products

*   GSD files for all rheonics devices are available for download from this page.
*   TwinCAT-compatible gsdml can be downloaded from this page under the name of GSDML-V2.4-Rheonics-SMET-TwinCAT-20220321
*   For S7-300, download the gsdml file named GSDML-V2.4-Rheonics-SMET-Legacy-20220321

Additionally, the Diagnosis and Parameter tables can be downloaded from this page as excel files and can be imported into Siemens TIA PORTAL software.

References

1.  Diagnostics and Parameter Readings with Profinet
    (https://support.rheonics.com/support/solutions/articles/81000401909-diagnostics-and-parameter-readings-with-profinet)
2.  Rheonics Sensor Integration with TIA portal
    (https://support.rheonics.com/support/solutions/articles/81000401598-rheonics-sensor-integration-with-tia-portal)

Downloads
key_facts: Profinet GSD files for Rheonics inline viscometers and density meters are available for download.
GSD files for all Rheonics devices are available for download from this page.
A TwinCAT-compatible GSDML file is available for download named GSDML-V2.4-Rheonics-SMET-TwinCAT-20220321.
For S7-300 systems, a GSDML file named GSDML-V2.4-Rheonics-SMET-Legacy-20220321 is available for download.
Diagnosis and Parameter tables for Rheonics products can be downloaded as Excel files.
The downloaded Excel files containing Diagnosis and Parameter tables can be imported into Siemens TIA PORTAL software.
Reference articles include 'Diagnostics and Parameter Readings with Profinet' and 'Rheonics Sensor Integration with TIA portal'.
